RuleSet.Name: src/schemaprot/ISchemaProtTableTable.java

GenFile.Name: reallyFileISchemaProtTableTableJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$prot/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$prot

RuleSet.GenRule: boolean $leadlower Name$( I$DefSchemaName$ProtSchemaObj schemaObj$iterate Params( each declServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );
boolean $leadlower Name$( I$DefSchemaName$ProtSchemaObj schemaObj, I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj obj$iterate Params( each declServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );

*$reference RetTable DefSchemaName$Prot$reference RetTable Name$ $leadlower Name$( I$reference RetTable DefSchemaName$ProtSchemaObj schemaObj$iterate Params( each declProtServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );

I$reference RetTable DefSchemaName$Prot$reference RetTable Name$ $leadlower Name$( I$reference RetTable DefSchemaName$ProtSchemaObj schemaObj, I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj obj$iterate Params( each declProtServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );

I$reference RetTable DefSchemaName$Prot$reference RetTable Name$[] $leadlower Name$( I$reference RetTable DefSchemaName$ProtSchemaObj schemaObj$iterate Params( each declProtServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );

I$reference RetTable DefSchemaName$Prot$reference RetTable Name$[] $leadlower Name$( I$reference RetTable DefSchemaName$ProtSchemaObj schemaObj, I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj obj$iterate Params( each declProtServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );

/** * Read the derived $TableName$ record instance by primary key. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information. * * @param PKey The primary key of the $TableName$ instance to be read. * * @return The record instance for the specified primary key, or null if there is * no such existing key value. */ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$ readDerived( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization, $IProtCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ PKey );

/** * Read the derived $TableName$ record instance by primary key. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information. * * @return The record instance for the specified primary key, or null if there is * no such existing key value. */ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$ readDerived( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization$reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each declProtCommaColumnArg )$ );

/** * Lock the derived $TableName$ record instance by primary key. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information. * * @param PKey The primary key of the $TableName$ instance to be locked. * * @return The record instance for the specified primary key, or null if there is * no such existing key value. */ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$ lockDerived( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization, $IProtCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ PKey );

/** * Read all $TableName$ instances. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information. * * @return An array of derived record instances, potentially with 0 elements in the set. */ I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$[] readProtAllDerived( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization );
$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable declProtReadTableDerivedByIndexes$$iterate Index( each declProtReadTableDerivedByNonPrimaryIndex )$
$reference Table reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex Suffix$

/** * Read the derived $poptop Table TableName$ record instance identified by the unique key $Suffix$. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information.$iterate Columns( each implCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return The record instance for the specified key, or null if there is * no such existing key value. */ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$ readDerivedBy$declReadTableSuffix$( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization$iterate Columns( each declProtCommaColumnArg )$ );

/** * Read an array of the derived $poptop Table TableName$ record instances identified by the duplicate key $Suffix$. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information.$iterate Columns( each implCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return An array of derived instances for the specified key, potentially with 0 elements in the set. */ I$DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$[] readDerivedBy$declProtReadTableSuffix$( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization$iterate Columns( each declProtCommaColumnArg )$ );

/** * Read the specific $TableName$ record instance identified by the primary key. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information. * * @param PKey The primary key of the $TableName$ instance to be locked. * * @return The record instance for the specified primary key, or null if there is * no such existing key value. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. */ I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$ readRec( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization, $IProtCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ PKey );

/** * Read the specific $TableName$ record instance identified by the primary key. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information. * * @param PKey The primary key of the $TableName$ instance to be locked. * * @return The record instance for the specified primary key, or null if there is * no such existing key value. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. */ I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$ readRec( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization$reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each declProtCommaColumnArg )$ );

/** * Lock the specific $TableName$ record instance identified by the primary key. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information. * * @param PKey The primary key of the $TableName$ instance to be locked. * * @return The record instance for the specified primary key, or null if there is * no such existing key value. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. */ I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$ lockRec( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization, $IProtCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ PKey );

/** * Read all the specific $TableName$ record instances. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information. * * @return All the specific $TableName$ instances in the database accessible for the Authorization. */ I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$[] readAllRec( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization );
$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable declProtReadTableRecByIndexes$$iterate Index( each declProtReadTableRecByNonPrimaryIndex )$
$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable declProtPageTableRecByIndexes$$iterate Index( each declProtPageTableRecByNonPrimaryIndex )$

/** * Read the specific $poptop Table TableName$ record instance identified by the unique key $Suffix$. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information.$iterate Columns( each implCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return The record instance for the specified key, or null if there is * no such existing key value. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. */ I$DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$ readRecBy$declProtReadTableSuffix$( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization$iterate Columns( each declProtCommaColumnArg )$ );

/** * Read an array of the specific $poptop Table TableName$ record instances identified by the duplicate key $Suffix$. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information.$iterate Columns( each implCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return An array of derived record instances for the specified key, potentially with 0 elements in the set. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. */ I$DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$[] readRecBy$declProtReadTableSuffix$( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization$iterate Columns( each declProtCommaColumnArg )$ );

/** * Read a page of all the specific $TableName$ record instances. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information. * * @return All the specific $TableName$ instances in the database accessible for the Authorization. */ I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$[] pageAllRec( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization$reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each declProtCommaOptPriorArg )$ );

/** * Read a page array of the specific $poptop Table TableName$ record instances identified by the duplicate key $Suffix$. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information.$iterate Columns( each implCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return An array of derived record instances for the specified key, potentially with 0 elements in the set. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. */ I$DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$[] pageRecBy$declReadTableSuffix$( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization$iterate Columns( each declCommaColumnArg )$$poptop Table reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each declCommaOptPriorArg )$ );

/** * Move the specified record up in the chain (i.e. to the previous position.) * * @return The refreshed record after it has been moved */ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Prot$poptop Table TableName$ moveRecUp( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization$reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each declProtCommaColumnArg )$, int revision );

/** * Move the specified record down in the chain (i.e. to the next position.) * * @return The refreshed record after it has been moved */ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$$poptop Table TableName$ moveRecDown( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization$reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each declCommaColumnArg )$, int revision );

/** * Get the next $Name$ id generator value. * * @param PKey The primary key of the $TableName$ instance generating the id. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. * * @return The next id value as generated by the cluster database. */ short next$Name$( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization, $IProtCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ PKey );
/** * Get the next $Name$ id generator value.$reference Dispenser reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each implCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. * * @return The next id value as generated by the cluster database. */ short next$Name$( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization$reference Dispenser reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each implProtNextIdGenDeclAttr )$ );
* * @param $Name$ The $poptop Table TableName$ key attribute of the instance generating the id.

/** * Get the next $Name$ id generator value. * * @param PKey The primary key of the $TableName$ instance generating the id. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. * * @return The next id value as generated by the cluster database. */ int next$Name$( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization, $IProtCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ PKey );
/** * Get the next $Name$ id generator value.$reference Dispenser reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each implCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. * * @return The next id value as generated by the cluster database. */ int next$Name$( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization$reference Dispenser reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each implProtNextIdGenDeclAttr )$ );

/** * Get the next $Name$ id generator value. * * @param PKey The primary key of the $TableName$ instance generating the id. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. * * @return The next id value as generated by the cluster database. */ long next$Name$( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization, $IProtCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ PKey );
/** * Get the next $Name$ id generator value.$reference Dispenser reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each implCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. * * @return The next id value as generated by the cluster database. */ long next$Name$( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization$reference Dispenser reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each implProtNextIdGenDeclAttr )$ );

/** * Get the next $Name$ id generator value. * * @param PKey The primary key of the $TableName$ instance generating the id. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. * * @return The next id value as generated by the cluster database. */ UUID next$Name$( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization, $IProtCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ PKey );

/** * Create the instance in the database, and update the specified record * with the assigned primary key. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information. * * @param rec The instance interface to be created. */ I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$ create$TableName$( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization, I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$ rec );

/** * Read all the specific $TableName$ instances from the database. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information. * * @return An array of the $TableName$ instances visible to the Authorization. */ I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$[] readAll$TableName$( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization );

/** * Update the instance in the database, and update the specified record * with any calculated changes imposed by the associated stored procedure. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information. * * @param rec The instance interface to be updated */ I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$ update$TableName$( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization, I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$ rec );

/** * Delete the instance from the database. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information. * * @param rec The instance interface to be deleted. */ void delete$TableName$( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization, I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$ rec );$declProtDeleteTableByInheritedIndexes$
$iterate Index( each declProtDeleteTableByNonPrimaryIndex empty empty )$$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable declProtDeleteTableByInheritedIndexes$

/** * Delete the $poptop Table TableName$ instances identified by the key $Suffix$. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information.$iterate Columns( each implCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ */ void delete$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization$iterate Columns( each implProtNextIdGenDeclAttr )$ );
/** * Delete the $poptop Table TableName$ instances identified by the key $Suffix$. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information. * * @param argKey The key identifying the instances to be deleted. */ void delete$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization, I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$By$Suffix$Key argKey );

$switch IsPrimaryIndexKeyAtomic yes empty default declProtDeleteTableByPrimaryIndexAttrs$ /** * Delete the $poptop Table TableName$ instance identified by the primary key. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information. * * @param argKey The primary key identifying the instance to be deleted. */ void delete$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( I$SecSchemaName$ProtAuthorization Authorization, $IProtCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ argKey );
